scene.message: Kandori: ...{wait_fr:60}Stop, Aki.{nl} Stand back.{waitkey}{ret}
Aki: But Papa...{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: Wait in that room.{nl} I'll come shortly.{waitkey}{ret}
Aki: ...{wait_fr:60}Okay.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Why?!{nl} Something's off about him.{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: ...{wait_fr:60}For what{nl} do you all live?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: The hell?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...{waitkey}{ret}
For what do you live?{nl} {ctl0e:15}{ret}
Kandori: What...?{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: You...{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: Silence...{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: Silence!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Yes!{nl} We can do it!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: You bet we can!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Obviously!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: Then show me!{nl} Before the throne of god!{waitkey}{ret}
